name: Kent Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Kent, WA since the 1980s offering collateral-based loans and a wide selection of used merchandise including jewelry, firearms, electronics, and tools.
description_long:
Kent Jewelry & Loan is a family-owned pawn shop located at 624 West Meeker Street in Kent, Washington, operating since the 1980s. The business markets itself as "Kent's oldest pawn shop" and has built its reputation on serving Washington residents through fair practices and reasonable pricing. The company operates on a traditional pawn model, combining retail sales of used goods with collateral-based lending services.

The business offers two primary services: buying and selling used merchandise, and providing short-term loans secured by personal items. Their inventory includes firearms, jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, bicycles, cameras, collectibles, and sporting goods. Customers can either sell items outright or use them as collateral for loans. The store requires customers to be 18 years old with a valid state-issued ID or driver's license to conduct business.

Kent Jewelry & Loan differentiates itself through longevity and family ownership in a competitive pawn market. The website emphasizes their "loyal" customer base, "honest personnel," and status as a "first choice pawnbroker" for the Kent area. Their broad inventory selection is attributed to customer loyalty and repeat business. The business maintains a physical storefront open limited hours and actively invites customers to call about current inventory.

As a traditional pawn operation, the business provides collateral-based lending without requiring credit checks—a legitimate financial service for consumers who need quick cash but may not qualify for conventional loans. However, the website lacks transparency regarding loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or typical loan amounts, which are critical factors for consumers considering pawn loans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned business operating since the 1980s with established local reputation
No credit check required for loans—accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Broad inventory selection including firearms, jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles
Offers both retail sales and collateral-based loans from a single location
Clear age verification requirement (18+ with valid ID) demonstrates regulatory compliance
Multiple contact methods available (phone, email, in-person) for customer service
Established customer loyalty base and repeat business model
cons: Website lacks critical loan term transparency: no APR, interest rates, or repayment period information disclosed
Limited and inconsistent hours of operation (website shows two different schedules: Tue-Sat 10AM-4PM and Mon-Fri 10AM-6PM)
No online loan application, inventory browsing, or digital convenience features
No information about loan amounts, maximum collateral values, or how valuations are determined
Missing details on what happens to unredeemed collateral or hold periods
best_for: Consumers who need quick cash and have items of value to use as collateral
People with poor credit history or no credit who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Buyers seeking affordable used merchandise including firearms, tools, jewelry, and electronics
Individuals looking for rare collectibles or specialty items in the Kent, WA area
diagnosis: Kent Jewelry & Loan is best for Kent-area residents and surrounding communities who need quick collateral-based loans or affordable used merchandise but should contact the store directly about loan terms, interest rates, and APR before committing, as this critical information is not disclosed on their website.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans against personal items
Purchase and sale of used firearms
Purchase and sale of jewelry and gold items
Purchase and sale of electronics and cameras
Purchase and sale of musical instruments
Purchase and sale of hand tools and power tools
Purchase and sale of sporting goods and bicycles
Purchase and sale of collectible items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
